# Exact ant-javacard source

This is the complete MIT-licensed source snapshot for the checked-in
`tools/ant-javacard-proven.jar`.

- Upstream: `https://github.com/martinpaljak/ant-javacard`
- Release tag: `18.05.01`
- Commit: `0629c9213b6c00866b70b06a20a18e7ff6fe413a`
- Official release JAR SHA-256:
  `def557393fd20dbe478a4581c3273222805b9e494836aa8465dfbe0fb9d64cf2`

The official release asset hash is byte-identical to
`tools/ant-javacard-proven.jar`. The upstream SDK submodule is intentionally
not duplicated here; the Card V1 builder checks out that separate SDK at its
own exact documented commit.

One historical developer-home path in the upstream README example is normalized
to `/path/to/`; executable source is unchanged.
